ogTitle: Carron vs Carrum Downs: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Carron and Carrum Downs.
heading: Carron vs Carrum Downs — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Carron, Victoria and Carrum Downs, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Carrum Downs has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Carron (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Carron or Carrum Downs safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Carron has a flood risk score of 42/100, while Carrum Downs scores 27/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Carron scores 17/100 for bushfire risk. Carrum Downs scores 37/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Carron or Carrum Downs?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Carrum Downs has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.88% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
